title: AI Agents for Lead Generation Input

maxResults.title: Max Results
maxResults.description: Maximum number of tools to return across all sources.

minRating.title: Minimum Rating
minRating.description: Minimum G2/Capterra rating to include (0–5). Tools below this threshold are excluded.

pricingModel.title: Pricing Model
pricingModel.description: Filter results by pricing model. Use 'all' to return every pricing tier.

integrations.title: Required Integrations
integrations.description: Return only tools that list at least one of these integrations (e.g. Salesforce, HubSpot). Leave empty to skip this filter.

sources.title: Sources to Scrape
sources.description: Which directories to include in the scrape run.
